title: LogicChange
description: A global audit record of a change to the SHARED analysis/generation logic, triggered by a human review finding in validate-recipe. The as-is/to-be/diff of the logic IS the git commit (commit_sha) — this record adds the human-provenance (which ad exposed it, the finding, the Q&A) + the impact (what the change makes stale). Append-only at STATE_DIR/audit/logic-changes.jsonl. See knowledge/reference/provenance-lineage.md.

trigger.description: the ad that EXPOSED the flaw (the symptom)

finding.description: what the human judged wrong (from the conversation)

qa_log.description: the user↔agent exchange that drove the change — a STRUCTURED record the agent authored at correction time (not a raw transcript dump); mark it as such, do not fabricate fidelity

commit_sha.description: the git commit that IS the logic fix (reuses git as as-is/to-be/diff)

scope.description: the human's verdict scope — whole pattern / only this ad / whole persona / everything

impact.description: what the change makes stale (flag only — re-run is the human's choice)
